item.title: Do We Need New Math for the Universe?
item.description: An exploration of whether current mathematics is enough to explain the universe or if new frameworks are needed to describe complex physical phenomena.

media:content.media:title: Do We Need New Math for the Universe?
media:content.media:description: An exploration of whether current mathematics is enough to explain the universe or if new frameworks are needed to describe complex physical phenomena.

item.title: Early Satellites and Their Purpose
item.description: A look at the first satellites and how early designs focused on communication, shaping the global networks we rely on today.

media:content.media:title: Early Satellites and Their Purpose
media:content.media:description: A look at the first satellites and how early designs focused on communication, shaping the global networks we rely on today.

item.title: A Decade That Changed Our View of the Universe
item.description: A look at a pivotal period in astronomy when key discoveries reshaped how scientists understand the universe and its origins.

media:content.media:title: A Decade That Changed Our View of the Universe
media:content.media:description: A look at a pivotal period in astronomy when key discoveries reshaped how scientists understand the universe and its origins.

item.title: Why Parsecs Can Be Confusing
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson discusses the astronomical unit called a parsec and explains why it can sometimes be misunderstood outside scientific contexts.

media:content.media:title: Why Parsecs Can Be Confusing
media:content.media:description: Neil deGrasse Tyson discusses the astronomical unit called a parsec and explains why it can sometimes be misunderstood outside scientific contexts.

item.title: What Happens Near a Blue Star?
item.description: An overview of blue stars, their high temperatures and brightness, and what conditions might be like for planets orbiting these powerful stars.

media:content.media:title: What Happens Near a Blue Star?
media:content.media:description: An overview of blue stars, their high temperatures and brightness, and what conditions might be like for planets orbiting these powerful stars.

item.title: How Wind Forms and Moves
item.description: A simple explanation of how differences in air pressure and temperature cause air to move, creating the wind we experience every day.

media:content.media:title: How Wind Forms and Moves
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how differences in air pressure and temperature cause air to move, creating the wind we experience every day.

item.title: Identifying Prenatal Brain Disorders
item.description: An overview of how medical imaging and testing can help doctors detect certain brain development conditions before birth

media:content.media:title: Identifying Prenatal Brain Disorders
media:content.media:description: An overview of how medical imaging and testing can help doctors detect certain brain development conditions before birth

item.title: Understanding Stem Cells
item.description: A clear introduction to stem cells, how they can develop into different cell types, and why scientists study them for medicine and biology.

media:content.media:title: Understanding Stem Cells
media:content.media:description: A clear introduction to stem cells, how they can develop into different cell types, and why scientists study them for medicine and biology.

item.title: How Common Knowledge Shapes Society
item.description: An exploration of how shared information and widely accepted ideas influence decisions, cooperation, and everyday life in communities.

media:content.media:title: How Common Knowledge Shapes Society
media:content.media:description: An exploration of how shared information and widely accepted ideas influence decisions, cooperation, and everyday life in communities.

item.title: Open Questions in Modern Physics
item.description: An overview of some unresolved questions in modern physics, including challenges in understanding gravity, quantum mechanics, and the structure of the universe.

media:content.media:title: Open Questions in Modern Physics
media:content.media:description: An overview of some unresolved questions in modern physics, including challenges in understanding gravity, quantum mechanics, and the structure of the universe.

item.title: Who Works on Unsolved Math Problems?
item.description: A look at how mathematicians around the world study and attempt to solve long-standing problems that continue to challenge the field of mathematics.

media:content.media:title: Who Works on Unsolved Math Problems?
media:content.media:description: A look at how mathematicians around the world study and attempt to solve long-standing problems that continue to challenge the field of mathematics.
